scripts.dev:api: uv run --project apps/api uvicorn --app-dir apps/api app.main:app --reload --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
scripts.dev:worker: uv run --project apps/api celery -A app.celery_app.celery_app --workdir apps/api worker --loglevel=INFO
scripts.migrate:api: uv run --project apps/api alembic -c apps/api/alembic.ini upgrade head
scripts.rollback:api: uv run --project apps/api alembic -c apps/api/alembic.ini downgrade base
